title: BSc (Hons) Computing
subtitle: Develop the skills to build the future of technology.
description: Gain a deep understanding of software development, networks, and database systems with our London Met awarded degree.
overview: The BSc (Hons) Computing program is designed to provide you with a comprehensive understanding of computer science principles and practical software development skills. You will learn to design, develop, and maintain complex software systems that solve real-world problems.

modules.name: Programming Fundamentals
modules.description: Introduction to logic and core programming concepts.

entryRequirements.academic: Completion of 10+2 with a minimum of 50%

learningOutcomes: Design and implement complex software solutions
Apply agile methodologies in team environments

faculty.name: Dr. Sameer Rai
faculty.description: 15+ years of industry experience in AI.

quote.text: The computing program at IIC transformed my perspective on technology.
quote.author: Anjali Sharma, Alumna

faqs.question: Is this degree internationally recognized?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is awarded by London Metropolitan University.
